non_blocking_issues: ConnectionCoordinator: an already-enqueued job that begins after TOFU becomes pending still executes the pre-loop writeConnection(isConnecting=true/Connecting) before reaching the new loop guard; can temporarily replace AwaitingTofuTrust (pendingTofuCapture stays set). No longer probes or writes terminal Disconnected — round-2 blocker fixed — but moving the pending guard before that initial state write would make the freeze semantically complete.
notes: round-3. Round-2 freeze-completeness blocker FIXED: top-of-loop pending guard prevents already-enqueued jobs from probing/consuming retries once TOFU is pending; terminal-path guard prevents jobs already inside checkHealth from writing Disconnected after another job establishes pending TOFU. applyTofuDecision refreshes HttpImageHolder SSL; SslConfig/SslConfigFactory KDoc accurately removes the obsolete trust-all model. check.sh --full + instrumented 10/10 accepted (not independently rerun in read-only delta review).
